name: seo-geo-content-engine
description: Turn keywords into publish-ready SEO and GEO content packages with keyword research, SERP analysis, article generation, FAQ schema, and AI-ready output.

metadata.minimum_permissions: read-only keyword tracker access and vetted SERP API output only when explicitly configured
metadata.data_access_policy: Private trackers and live SERP access are opt-in only. The workflow can continue from user-provided keywords, CSV exports, or pasted SERP snapshots without hidden scraping.
